narrative:
Coitsville Twp township has 960 registered voters, with 56.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 13.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 30.2%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 16.7 percentage points.
